verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think of you Jesus Walking earths dusty sands And every step you took Was for the good of all men Then finally you gave your all You bore every sin Thank God you'll never have to do it again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And there'll be no more dusty roads for your precious feet No more worn sandals No more desert heat There'll be no more beatings No more shame to go thru There'll be no more bloodshed No more calvary for you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I think of you Jesus Walking on the streets of gold A position so deserving A King's title you hold In a Kingdom with no end It's so fitting for you Lord when I think of Heaven I think of all you went thru
